title: BEM-769B wake smoke retry
objective:

"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:21 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
smoke=load('governance/state/dispatcher_wake_smoke_state.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
if smoke.get('last_seen_at'):
    status='workflow_run_wake_path_proven'
    blocker=None
    next_action='wake path works; isolate Claude Action/provider blocker and prove real Claude response'
else:
    status='workflow_run_wake_path_not_proven'
    blocker={'code':'WORKFLOW_RUN_WAKE_PATH_NOT_PROVEN','message':'Smoke workflow did not leave state after fresh Codex completion. Switch to direct state-producing dispatch path.'}
    next_action='replace workflow_run dependency with direct dispatch/state-producing path'
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem769b_next_after_wake_smoke.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-769B Next After Wake Smoke'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-769B WAKE SMOKE RESULT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'check_wake_smoke_result_retry.v1','bem':'BEM-769B','status':status,'smoke_state':smoke,'claude_runtime_state':runtime,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem769b_check_wake_smoke_result_retry.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem769b_check_wake_smoke_result_retry.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-769B | Check Wake Smoke Result Retry | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Smoke last seen: '+str(smoke.get('last_seen_at'))+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem769b_check_wake_smoke_result_retry','status':status,'smoke_last_seen_at':smoke.get('last_seen_at'),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem769b_check_wake_smoke_result_retry.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-769B '+status+' smoke_last_seen='+str(smoke.get('last_seen_at'))+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Retried wake-smoke result check after previous task creation conflict and routed next step')
"""
